verified.name: TVMaze
verified.tagline: Search TV shows, episodes and cast from a community DB
verified.description: TVMaze exposes a keyless REST API for television metadata: show details, episode lists, air schedules, cast and crew. Query by name or ID and get clean JSON back, with no signup on the free tier.
verified.freeTier: Free for personal/non-commercial use, no key
verified.rateLimit: At least 20 calls per 10 seconds per IP (per docs)

verified.name: Metro Lisboa
verified.tagline: Live service status for Lisbon Metro's four colored lines
verified.description: Returns the current running status of Lisbon Metro's yellow, blue, green and red lines as simple JSON. It is the same public feed that powers the operator's status page, refreshed in near real time.
verified.notes: The official OAuth API at api.metrolisboa.pt needs a key; this app.metrolisboa.pt status feed is keyless.

verified.name: Transport for Grenoble, France
verified.tagline: Grenoble tram and bus routes, stops and times as JSON
verified.description: The Metromobilite open-data API serves the SMMAG transit network around Grenoble, France. This keyless endpoint lists every tram and bus route with names, colors and modes; other paths cover stops and real-time arrivals.

sampleJson.longName: Fontaine La Poya / Le Pont-de-Claix L'Etoile

verified.name: Transport for Paris, France
verified.tagline: Explore RATP Paris open-data datasets over a JSON API
verified.description: RATP publishes Paris transit open data through an OpenDataSoft portal with a fully keyless REST API. Browse the dataset catalog or query records for things like station traffic and air quality, all returned as JSON.

verified.name: Transport for Philadelphia, US
verified.tagline: Real-time SEPTA Philadelphia train positions and delays
verified.description: SEPTA's public API reports live regional-rail train locations, destinations, delays and next stops for the Philadelphia area. No key is required; the TrainView endpoint returns an array of every active train as JSON.

verified.name: Transport for United States
verified.tagline: Live bus and transit predictions across US agencies
verified.description: The Umo IQ (formerly NextBus) public JSON feed covers dozens of North American transit agencies. Start from the agency list, then drill into routes, stops and real-time vehicle predictions, no key needed.

sampleJson.copyright: All data copyright agencies listed below and Umo IQ 2026.

verified.dataLicense: Data copyright transit agencies / Umo IQ
verified.notes: Docs are for the XML feed; publicJSONFeed returns the same data as JSON.

verified.name: ReSmush.it
verified.tagline: Free image optimization: shrink JPG, PNG and more by URL
verified.description: Point reSmush.it at an image URL and it returns a compressed copy plus before/after byte sizes as JSON. It is a keyless optimization service supporting JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP and TIFF with adjustable quality.
verified.freeTier: Free; per-image size cap applies (see docs)
verified.dataLicense: N/A — optimization service, not a dataset

verified.name: Open Government, Romania
verified.tagline: Romania's national open-data catalog over the CKAN API
verified.description: data.gov.ro is Romania's official open-data portal running on CKAN, so it speaks the standard CKAN Action API. This keyless call lists dataset identifiers; further endpoints return metadata and downloadable resources across government topics.

verified.name: Minor Planet Center
verified.tagline: Query asteroids by orbit, size and value via Asterank
verified.description: Asterank wraps Minor Planet Center and JPL orbital data behind a keyless query API. Send a MongoDB-style filter and get back asteroids with diameter, orbital elements, albedo and Asterank's estimated mining value as JSON.

verified.name: MLB Records and Stats
verified.tagline: Official MLB stats: teams, standings, players and games
verified.description: MLB's Stats API serves current and historical baseball data, teams, rosters, standings, schedules and box scores, without an API key. Responses are JSON and carry MLB Advanced Media's copyright terms.
verified.freeTier: Free — no key; subject to MLB copyright terms
verified.notes: The candidate's appac docs wrap the retired lookup-service-prod.mlb.com endpoint (now HTTP 530); the live keyless base is statsapi.mlb.com.

verified.name: Chronicling America
verified.tagline: Search millions of digitized historic US newspaper pages
verified.description: The Library of Congress serves its Chronicling America collection of historic American newspapers as JSON through the loc.gov API. Search by keyword, place or date to retrieve page-level records with titles, dates and image links.

results.title: The monitor (Omaha, Neb.), July 3, 1915
contributor: university of nebraska-lincoln libraries, lincoln, ne
subject: nebraska
douglas
united states
omaha

verified.rateLimit: LoC throttles heavy crawling (see LoC API policy)
verified.dataLicense: Public domain / no known copyright (Library of Congress)
verified.notes: The documented chroniclingamerica.loc.gov endpoint returns HTTP 403 to bots; the same collection is served via the loc.gov JSON API used here.
